info.description: Complete API collection for Food Delivery Backend

body.raw:
{
  "restaurantId": "restaurant_1",
  "productId": "product_101",
  "quantity": 2,
  "variationId": "var_standard",
  "addOnsIds": [
    "addon_cheese",
    "addon_pepperoni"
  ],
  "clearCart": false
}

SINGLE RESTAURANT RULE:
- If you try to add items from a different restaurant, you will get a 409 Conflict.
- To force add (and clear existing items), set "clearCart": true.

{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "mobile": "9876543210",
  "subject": "Issue with my order",
  "message": "I didn't receive my order. Please help."
}

{ "category": "Customer", "title": "How do I track my order?", "answer": "

You can track your order in real-time using our mobile app or website. Click on the 'Track Order' button to see the current location of your delivery rider.

", "order": 1, "isActive": true }
